title: Maa's Sky Islands
description: Datapack that changes world generation. A less difficult version of the Maa's Sky Islands
body:
Recommended game rule: doVinesSpread false

**This datapack changes the overworld generation to flying islands. Casual version where ores and villages are generated. Some biomes have been removed because they don't fit stylistically into this generation.**

---
### New biomes have been added:
- Acid badlands - A hot biome with little vegetation. It resembles the Yellowstone badlands
  ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cada18a412fd54fdaa8135690690d5860fc8b47.jpeg)
- Cold swamp - Oligotrophic swamp. This biome is similar to the swamps of Canada or Siberia
  ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3c0d1562a08c9c96e2417743ceffab85ab74a2a.jpeg)
- Cold taiga - A very cold version of the taiga. Some trees are covered with ice
  ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48a6ff6f02e8f8a2938d135261096fc4df5cb12f.jpeg)
- Fall forest - Temperate woodlands biome. Grass and foliage of autumn colors
  ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e78477dea09cdfa8c7ca8c561acf3e73d683936b.jpeg)
- Old growth fall forest - Fall forest variant with tall trees
  ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e16ca0ea4db068a394bb0690f8696f9425ee0a93.jpeg)
- Redwoods - Taiga variant with tall mushrooms and sequoias
  ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7ee9a303443c46c9809e22f5634dcc6425bc8ea.jpeg)
- Spooky forest - A dangerous variant of a dark forest with very dense trees
  ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a26205579942914956ab7c4d9a2d490cf14a863.jpeg)
- Moonlight taiga - A taiga variant with lavender trees and mushrooms. There are many amethyst clusters here.
  ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c441505d7d0280875f8083c3bbb8d5014f77b805.jpeg)
- Old growth jungle - Jungle variant with dense trees
  ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01cec941dff47688f14cec66b628063589d9c8ad.jpeg)
- Old growth mushroom fields - Mushroom forest
  ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94e1f8f32cf91d292cb695abe72b3568acd4313a.jpeg)
  Sky beach - Sandy beach with a thematic structure
  ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f64591921be8a71897ae1e2f8f7edbdf4b3ef10.jpeg)

### Structures added:
- Forest Tower
  ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b24467891a0760ad49015ac3b77df4fa73aa29aa.jpeg)
- Spooky house(spider's lair)
  ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80e2788c8828b791da37e5c92f025a30e7d2c3f8.jpeg)
  ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d656feba5982832a6cc147c74fe6cd5bce4c4d2.jpeg)
- Taiga house
  ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08a1af6b15069ef581b3e2d100056ed2e36af487.jpeg)
- Spherical monument - Analogue of the Oceanic Monument
  ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09dd609b046fbd7da1110144bfe3d4a780a10114.jpeg)
- Flying ship
  ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d8f72703b0ea3f4effa1238ca8cb547c08e65f2.jpeg)

**Reworked default biomes. Many biomes contain large, branched trees (maybe you will need a tree-chopping mod)**

### Ore appears higher
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bb86116055c96c418220acdeacaab36bd000f1c.jpeg)
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a8e59a78ef5fcb034d5011e2741572f9ef686ed.jpeg)

### Changed generation of standard structures. Some structures have been removed
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15df5aabca555c0accaa31ab4ac1b75d6b190aa3.jpeg)
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb4fdda3988aa9f70a073f4d196a93ed5b8cc7e5.jpeg)
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8266f7872318548d7bddd377b970722893d9fdc0.jpeg)
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac52cfbb625f88be40cdb1baab5d6ce285535892.jpeg)

P.S. I used Complementary Unbound shaders
